description_long: This is a vintage-style, freestanding desk with a distressed green finish and multiple drawers of varying sizes. The desk features a two-tiered design, with a main writing surface and an upper row of smaller drawers, all equipped with round metal knobs. Several drawers are shown partially open, revealing wooden interiors and suggesting ample storage space. The legs are turned and decorative, adding to the antique aesthetic. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and faded paint, giving it a rustic, well-used appearance. This piece would be suitable for use in an urban workshop, artist's studio, or as a statement piece in a public space.
description: A distressed green, vintage-style desk with multiple drawers and round metal knobs, featuring a two-tiered design and turned legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the desk, the thickness of the surfaces, and one open lower drawer.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all drawers, with several open to reveal wooden interiors and the full arrangement of knobs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the upper and lower tiers, with one upper drawer open and the desk's profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back panel and the overall width of the desk, with no drawers visible.
